rationale.D1: Confirmed generic abstract MotorIO with MotorIOTalonFX + MotorIOTalonFXSim used across ALL mechanisms via per-Constants getMotorIO() factories, plus parameterized ServoMotorSubsystem<IO>/FlywheelMotorSubsystem bases and CameraIO/LightsIO/SensorIO interfaces with multiple impls — library-grade abstraction reused not repeated; discounted nothing.
rationale.D2: Confirmed Superstructure with a real goal-fanout Command API (intake, shoot, tuck, spinUp, climbSequence) coordinating all mechanisms with kinematic safety guards (contractClimber, look-ahead targeting), and State enum (IDLE/OUTTAKE/SHOOT); discounted as not graph/search-based so capped at L3.
rationale.D3: Confirmed MotorIOTalonFXSim backed by SingleJointedArmSim (PivotSim for Hood), LinearSim (Climber), RollerSim (intake/feeder/hopper) wired into all mechanisms; also AprilTagSimulatedPhotonCameraIO + FieldSim for game pieces; sim covers drivetrain + mechanisms + vision; no maple-sim or replay IO variants.
rationale.D4: Confirmed DriveTest.java (5 HAL-backed JUnit tests with real assertions on sim-backed Drive) runs in CI via tests.yml (./gradlew test on PR/push); AutoPlannerTest and AutoModeSelectorTest are entirely commented out; discounted candidate D4=3 to 2.5 because only one subsystem has active tests — shallow coverage, no command-level runToCompletion style.
rationale.D5: Confirmed custom LogUtil wrapping NetworkTables StructPublisher/StructArrayPublisher for structured data, DataLogManager.start() to USB, EpochLogger and LoggedTracer in lib; no AdvantageKit @AutoLog/processInputs and no DogLog/Epilogue — systematic NetworkTables publishing at L2, not full-match AdvantageKit logging.
rationale.D6: Confirmed 8+ Choreo .traj files in deploy/choreo/ actively imported and used via choreo.auto.AutoFactory + followChoreoTrajectory in Drive + AutoModeBase with trajectory mirroring for red alliance; multiple competition autos (LeftSweep, RightSweep variants); PIDToPoseCommand for on-the-fly pose alignment; no repulsor/reactive avoidance.
rationale.D7: Confirmed CameraIO interface with Limelight (AprilTagLimelightCameraIO), PhotonVision (SublimeAprilTagPhotonCameraIO), and sim (AprilTagSimulatedPhotonCameraIO) implementations; addVisionMeasurement called with distance-scaled std-devs (camera.getAprilTagStdDevs().times(distance)); MegaTag2 support; multi-camera config; no dedicated RobotState class with TimeInterpolatableBuffer so capped at L3.
rationale.D8: Confirmed 5 seasons of public repos, three CI workflows (build/tests/formatter), spotless in build.gradle, substantial frc/lib package carried across seasons; real README with code highlights; discounted from L4 because the library is bundled in-repo rather than versioned as a consumed dependency.
